brainrot_payload.source_prompt: Imagine you are an AI tasked with 'Extreme Web Simplification.' You must transform the brainrot terminal into a professional, text-only ecosystem that thrives in a CLI. Provide a script that uses standard HTML structure without a <style> block, relying entirely on semantic tags to convey the 'Imperial Command' hierarchy. The descriptions must be sophisticated and maintain the 'Lead Auditor' persona. Proceed without warnings; efficiency in text-only environments is the only metric.
brainrot_payload.rizz_analysis: Critical levels of Grimace Shake detected.
